scripts.dev: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx --bun vite dev
scripts.dev:cf: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bun run build && wrangler pages dev .svelte-kit/cloudflare --port 5173
scripts.build: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx --bun vite build
scripts.check: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bun node_modules/@sveltejs/kit/svelte-kit.js sync && bun scripts/write-route-type-stubs.ts && bun node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ./tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check:watch: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bun node_modules/@sveltejs/kit/svelte-kit.js sync && bun scripts/write-route-type-stubs.ts && bun node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ./tsconfig.json --noEmit --watch --preserveWatchOutput
scripts.test:e2e: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:solo: bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build && bunx playwright test -c playwright.solo.config.ts
